item.title: Back View Trick Challenge
item.description: Has anyone seen it from the back? A creative trick challenge focusing on timing, control, and clean movement, captured from a new perspective for a fresh look at the skill.

media:content.media:title: Back View Trick Challenge
media:content.media:description: Has anyone seen it from the back? A creative trick challenge focusing on timing, control, and clean movement, captured from a new perspective for a fresh look at the skill.
